jd_text:
Job Title: AI Product Engineer — CEO's Office
Company: Nicobar Design Pvt. Ltd. (nicobar.com)
Location: Delhi
Experience: 3-5 years

THE OPPORTUNITY
We've spent a decade building a brand that looks and feels unmistakably Nicobar. The next chapter is building a company that thinks the same way — every store, every collection, every customer conversation: sharper, faster, unmistakably ours. AI-native, not in theory, but in every room we walk into.

WHAT YOU'LL OWN
01 Customer Personalization : Build the intelligence layer beneath all our customer communication that understands who each customer actually is.
02 Store Clienteling : Build the clienteling tool our store teams reach for every day.
03 Business Intelligence : Replace Microsoft BI dashboards with a live, conversational intelligence layer.
04 Smoothen Design Workstreams : Remove friction so the creative team can make more, better, faster.

WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR
Engineering degree from IIT, BITS, NIT or equivalent with 3-5 years of experience.
You've built something real with an LLM API - OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, etc.
Fluent in Python/ NodeJS. Comfortable writing and querying SQL.
Ability to build front-ends that don't embarrass the brand. We're visual people.
master_cv:
# Hayagreev Sivakumar — CV

## Profile

Neuroscience-trained PM who ships AI products in high-velocity build-measure-learn cycles. Co-founded Emote, an Emotional Sense-Making AI, taking it from zero to 451 users in 7 months through continuous discovery and iteration. Led Data and AI platform scoping across 80+ bank departments at Grant Thornton. Strong in PRDs, behavioral data, system design, and technical collaboration. Looking to bring 5 years across engineering, data, product, and consulting to AI automation in regulated environments.

## Contact

- **Phone:** +91-9841837272
- **Email:** hayagreev.sivakumar@gmail.com
- **LinkedIn:** www.linkedin.com/in/hayagreev13/

## Experience

### Financial Transformation Consultant — Grant Thornton Bharat, Chennai (Jul 2025 - Present)

- Led enterprise requirement discovery for a data lakehouse and AI enablement program at an Indian Private Sector Bank by working directly with 80+ departments, identifying high-value analytics and AI use cases, and prioritizing scope based on feasibility, data readiness, and business impact to shape the final RFP and implementation roadmap
- Co-developed the RFP and solution blueprint for an AI-enabled data platform by aligning leadership, domain teams, and SMEs on ML and LLM use cases, data architecture, and governance, accelerating vendor evaluation and onboarding for next-generation analytics capabilities
- Executed ITGC and application control audits across critical banking systems (including Calypso and MFI platforms), assessing access, change, processing, interface, and resilience controls, and translating audit findings into defined control designs and operational flows to strengthen system reliability and risk posture
- Drove CRM transformation delivery (Zoho CRM) by translating gap assessment outputs into system-ready requirements, authoring BRDs and SRS, aligning business validation with bank stakeholders, and coordinating with API teams and vendors to ensure builds matched approved workflows and integrations, including post-go-live issue resolution across IDMS and CCMS systems

### Co-Founder — Emote, Chennai (May 2025 - Present)

- Architected an emotionally intelligent AI system grounded in behavioral science (habit loops, dopamine reward prediction, narrative processing), defining the product's core loop from emotional trigger → low-friction expression → state shift → pattern insight, and translating this into system design across memory, conversation modes, and interaction flows
- Ran rapid build-measure-learn cycles using live user data (451 users, 169 sessions, 1,313+ turns), leveraging observability systems and pattern analytics to identify a critical drop at Session 1 → Session 2 (24.1%) and redesign entry behavior to improve activation (76%) and early engagement
- Led end-to-end product execution by defining vision, converting it into structured requirements (BRDs and system specifications using AI-assisted tools like Copilot), collaborating with engineering on implementation, and iterating based on behavioral deltas; contributed to achieving 54.4% deep sessions (≥5 turns) and 7.8 avg turns per session
- Built a feedback-driven product system by integrating cohort analysis, power-user segmentation, and observability, enabling continuous iteration and driving post-activation engagement (S2→S3 ~68%, WoW retention ~12.9%) with repeat usage patterns emerging across high-intent user segments
- Built an AI-driven Reddit outreach system to acquire users by identifying high-intent threads, generating personalized messages, and automating engagement; executed 5,100+ targeted DMs with ~17-21% reply rate (12-15 replies per ~70 DMs/day) and ~9% conversion (~456 users), establishing a scalable zero-cost acquisition channel aligned with product-market discovery

## Education

- **Stoa School** — General MBA Program, Remote, India (Sept 2023 - Apr 2024)
- **CentraleSupelec** — M.Sc. Computational Neuroscience and Neuroengineering, Paris, France (Sept 2021 - Aug 2022) — GPA: 17.42/20 (top 15%)
- **SSN College of Engineering** — B.E. Electronics and Communications Engineering, Chennai (Jul 2016 - Sept 2020) — CGPA: 8.38/10

## Skills

- Management & Consulting: Project Management, Lean Management, Stakeholder Management, Client Relationships, GTM
- Data Engineering & Analytics: Python, SQL (Postgres, Redshift), Apache Spark, Airflow, Power BI, Tableau
- ML & AI: PyTorch, TensorFlow, scikit-learn, MLOps (Kubeflow, Docker, Azure ML), Prompt Engineering
- Tools & Platforms: AWS (S3, EMR), Anaconda, Jupyter, Git, MS Office (Excel, PowerPoint), VS Code
- AI & Automation: ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Perplexity, Zapier, Make, Lovable

company_intelligence.summary: Nicobar Design is a 10-year-old design-driven lifestyle brand with physical stores and likely D2C e-commerce, headquartered in Delhi. The JD reveals an ambition to become AI-native across customer engagement, store operations, and business intelligence.
company_intelligence.business_model: Retail (physical stores) and likely D2C e-commerce, selling design-focused lifestyle products (likely home and apparel)
company_intelligence.india_presence: Delhi HQ, retail stores across India (implied by 'every store')
company_intelligence.positioning_implications: Lead with consumer-facing AI product experience in retail/e-commerce; emphasize design-thinking and business-outcome focus; high-visibility role reporting to CEO.
company_intelligence.interview_implications: Expect design-thinking exercises, business-outcome discussions, and likely a case study on personalization or store tooling; UI sensibility may be assessed given the brand's visual nature.
signals_from_jd: 4 product areas (personalization, clienteling, BI, design workflows)

positioning_strategy.one_line_positioning: AI Product Engineer who ships consumer personalization AI from concept to conversion
positioning_strategy.narrative_angle: Product-minded AI engineer with a founder's instinct for user activation and business impact, ready to own customer intelligence for a design-led brand
proof_points_to_emphasize: Built AI-driven outreach with ~9% conversion on Reddit
Co-founded Emote, shipping AI product to 451 users with 76% activation
Led enterprise AI enablement across 80+ departments at a major bank
positioning_strategy.recruiter_first_impression_target: Engineer who has end-to-end shipped an AI product and understands personalization at scale
positioning_strategy.reasoning: Strong evidence of LLM API integration and personalization; misses NodeJS and frontend requirements but transferable product engineering and enterprise AI enablement experience.
